rationale: Coinglass public pages show CFX perpetual funding rates and open interest directionally, but precise real-time 8h funding rate and total OI figures require a paid API tier or authenticated session; 30-day correlation coefficients against BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ are not published as ready-made metrics on any of the listed free sources and would require raw OHLCV downloads plus manual calculation — all values are therefore NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER under the stated source constraints.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/futures/CFX — funding rate & OI overview page (aggregated display only; granular figures behind auth/paid tier)
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/conflux-token — spot price history downloadable as CSV for manual correlation calc, but pre-computed correlations not provided
https://defillama.com/protocol/conflux — TVL/chain data only, no derivatives metrics
https://fred.stlouisfed.org — NASDAQ Composite (NASDAQCOM) series available for download but correlation vs CFX not pre-computed
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market sentiment only, no CFX-specific correlation data
